transcript: Speaker A: Sir second AC mein kaise jana hai? [Sir, how to go to second AC?] Speaker B: Go straight this way and after two compartments you'll reach the second AC coach. Speaker A: Sir samjha nahi, English acche se nahi aati. [Sir, didn't understand, I don't know English well.] Speaker B: Arey aaj kal ke zamane mein English seekhna toh bhot important hai, seekh kyu nahi lete? [Oh, in today's world, learning English is very important, why don't you learn?] Speaker A: Sir mere paas time kaha hai, aapne kaha se seekha? [Sir, where do I have the time, where did you learn from?] Speaker B: Maine toh MySivi app se seekha hai. Aur zyada time ki koi zarurat nahi hai, iss app pe bas 10-15 min practice karo and your English will get better in some days. [I learned from MySivi app. And there's no need for much time, just practice 10-15 mins on this app and your English will get better in some days.] Speaker A: Yeh MySivi app kya hai? [What is this MySivi app?] Speaker B: Iss app me ek AI teacher hai jiske sath tum bina kisi judgment ke English practice kar sakte ho. Aur best part ki galtiyan karoge toh AI turant correct bhi kar deti hai. [In this app, there is an AI teacher with whom you can practice English without any judgment. And the best part is if you make mistakes, the AI corrects them immediately.] Speaker A: Par sir, yeh app toh mehanga hoga na? [But sir, this app must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: Bilkul nahi. Maine toh 1rs mein shuru kiya tha, tum bhi kar sakte ho. [Not at all. I started for 1 rupee, you can too.] Speaker A: Kaise start karu? [How do I start?] Speaker B: Bas install button pe click karo, MySivi app install karo and apne English learning journey shuru karo. [Just click on the install button, install MySivi app and start your English learning journey.] Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Sir second AC; way and after; two compartments; you'll reach; Sir samjha nahi, English acche se nahi aati; Arey aaj kal ke zamane mein English seekhna toh bhot important hai, seekh kyu nahi lete?; Sir mere paas time kaha hai, aapne kaha se seekha?; Maine toh MySivi app se seekha hai. Aur zyada time ki koi zarurat nahi hai, iss app pe bas 10-15 min practice karo and your English will get better in some days; Yeh MySivi app kya hai?; Iss app me ek AI teacher hai jiske sath tum bina kisi judgment ke English practice kar sakte ho. Aur best part ki galtiyan karoge toh AI turant correct bhi kar deti hai; Par sir, yeh app toh mehanga hoga na?; Bilkul nahi. Maine toh 1rs mein shuru kiya tha, tum bhi kar sakte ho; Kaise start karu?; Bas install button pe click karo, MySivi app install karo and apne English learning journey shuru karo; MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A passenger on a train struggles to understand English directions from a ticket collector, who then recommends the MySivi app. The ticket collector explains that the app features an AI teacher that corrects mistakes without judgment in just 10-15 minutes a day, starting at only 1 rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
